name: RxNorm / RxNav
query_templates: RxNorm RxCUI {medication}
RxNav NDC relationships {medication}
notes_for_agent: Use as the low-friction identity layer for medication names, RxCUIs, and NDC relationships.
use: Normalize medication names and connect brand, generic, RxCUI, and NDC context.

name: openFDA NDC Directory
query_templates: openFDA NDC {medication} labeler packaging
notes_for_agent: Use for product, labeler, packaging, and brand or generic metadata. Do not treat it as a price source.
use: Ground drug identity and packaging facts.

name: NADAC / Medicaid Drug Pricing API
query_templates: NADAC {medication} NDC acquisition cost
notes_for_agent: Use as a public acquisition-cost grounding signal, not as patient out-of-pocket cost.
use: Explain public cost basis and separate acquisition-cost context from patient-specific prices.

name: CMS Part D Formulary PUF
query_templates: CMS Part D formulary PUF {medication} tier PA ST QL
notes_for_agent: Use for Medicare Part D formulary tier and utilization-management signals. Requires download or ETL, not a live claim.
use: Explain tier, PA, step-therapy, and quantity-limit context when public plan data is available.

name: Da Vinci PDex US Drug Formulary FHIR
query_templates: Da Vinci PDex US Drug Formulary FHIR {medication}
notes_for_agent: Use for FHIR formulary workflow shape and future API alignment. Public reference servers may be synthetic.
use: Demo the future formulary API shape without presenting synthetic values as real plan data.

name: Medicare Part D costs
query_templates: Medicare Part D {medication} cost sharing 2026
notes_for_agent: Use for Medicare cost-sharing context, not a live adjudicated copay.
use: Explain deductible, out-of-pocket cap, and cost-stage basics for Part D cases.

name: Medicare Prescription Payment Plan
query_templates: Medicare Prescription Payment Plan specialty drug monthly payments
notes_for_agent: This smooths cash flow; do not represent it as a total price reduction.
use: Route Part D users to payment smoothing when the immediate fill cost is the problem.

name: Medicare Extra Help
query_templates: Extra Help Medicare Part D eligibility
notes_for_agent: Ask about income and assets before suggesting likely eligibility.
use: Screen and route Medicare users toward low-income subsidy support.

name: State Pharmaceutical Assistance Programs
query_templates: State Pharmaceutical Assistance Program {state} Medicare drug costs
notes_for_agent: Rules vary heavily by state; verify state-specific eligibility and program status.
use: Find state wraparound programs or state drug assistance for eligible Medicare users.

name: Health plan or PBM member portal estimate
query_templates: health plan PBM member portal prescription cost estimate
notes_for_agent: Use screenshots or user-provided estimates before partner access exists. Do not claim live portal access.
use: Show the workflow for patient-specific benefit estimates while access is gated.

name: Stedi X12 270/271
query_templates: Stedi healthcare eligibility 270 271 deductible out of pocket
notes_for_agent: Valuable for eligibility and deductible context, but requires account, payer enrollment, and PHI handling.
use: Future patient-specific eligibility, coverage, deductible, and out-of-pocket balance checks.

name: Surescripts RTPB
query_templates: Surescripts real-time prescription benefit patient out of pocket
notes_for_agent: True patient-specific price rail, but not self-serve. Use only through partnerships.
use: Future patient-specific out-of-pocket, coverage, PA status, and alternative checks.

name: Arrive Health RTPB
query_templates: Arrive Health real-time prescription benefit patient out of pocket
notes_for_agent: True price rail through partnership access. Do not present as live unless integration is active.
use: Future patient-specific price and therapeutic alternative checks.

name: GoodRx cash discount context
query_templates: GoodRx {medication} specialty pharmacy cash price
notes_for_agent: Warn that cash discount spend may not count toward deductible or OOP maximum.
use: Compare cash discount context against insurance while warning that it is not stackable.
review_cadence: Daily or weekly if live; monthly if manual

name: SingleCare
query_templates: SingleCare {medication} cash discount price
notes_for_agent: Use as an additional cash discount comparison with the same insurance-credit warnings.
use: Compare additional cash discount routes where partner access or manual checks are available.
review_cadence: Daily or weekly if live; monthly if manual

name: RxSaver
query_templates: RxSaver {medication} cash discount price
notes_for_agent: Use as an additional cash discount comparison with the same insurance-credit warnings.
use: Compare additional cash discount routes where partner access or manual checks are available.
review_cadence: Daily or weekly if live; monthly if manual

name: Mark Cuban Cost Plus Drugs
query_templates: Cost Plus Drugs {medication} cash price
notes_for_agent: Use as transparent cash pricing when the medication is covered. Cash path may not count toward insurance progress.
use: Check transparent cash pricing for eligible medications.

name: Amazon Pharmacy / RxPass
query_templates: Amazon Pharmacy RxPass {medication} price
notes_for_agent: Usually best for common generics, not specialty biologics. Verify eligibility and pharmacy routing.
use: Compare cash or subscription paths for eligible common medications.

name: Ozempic cost and coverage
query_templates: Ozempic cost coverage savings self-pay price
notes_for_agent: Use for current public Ozempic savings and self-pay price bands; eligibility, coverage, and pharmacy processing must be verified.
use: Public Ozempic commercial savings and self-pay price bands for pre-fill estimates.

name: Ozempic Savings Offer terms
query_templates: Ozempic Savings Offer terms government beneficiaries deductible out-of-pocket
notes_for_agent: Use for eligibility exclusions, self-pay definitions, and the warning that self-pay offer fills do not count toward deductibles or OOP maximums.
use: Ozempic offer eligibility, government-program exclusions, and deductible/OOP caveats.

name: Zepbound savings options
query_templates: Zepbound savings card LillyDirect self-pay options
notes_for_agent: Use for current public Zepbound savings and self-pay route context. Eligibility, dosage, pharmacy channel, taxes, fees, and terms must be verified.
use: Public Zepbound savings and self-pay route context for sticker-shock demos.

name: LillyDirect Zepbound
query_templates: LillyDirect Zepbound self-pay price
notes_for_agent: Use as a direct-pay fallback source. Do not treat it as an insurance price or guaranteed savings; terms, strengths, fees, and availability can change.
use: Compare direct self-pay pricing against the pharmacy quote when insurance coverage is weak or pending.

name: ADA Standards of Care pharmacologic treatment
query_templates: ADA Standards of Care type 2 diabetes GLP-1 SGLT2 metformin
notes_for_agent: Use only to frame prescriber-discussion alternatives; do not make a clinical substitution recommendation.
use: Clinical context for diabetes medication classes to discuss with the prescriber.
review_cadence: Annually and when ADA updates living standards

name: Enbrel Support
query_templates: Enbrel copay card terms government insurance
notes_for_agent: Manufacturer copay support is generally not valid for Medicare or other public programs.
use: Check Enbrel commercial copay support terms and government-program exclusions.

name: Amgen Safety Net Foundation
query_templates: Amgen Safety Net Foundation Enbrel eligibility
notes_for_agent: Potential PAP route; eligibility and availability must be confirmed.
use: Screen free-drug or underinsured support for eligible patients.

name: NeedyMeds
query_templates: NeedyMeds {medication} patient assistance program
notes_for_agent: Use for PAP discovery with manual confirmation. Do not assume a reliable public API.
use: Discover possible PAP routes and store confirmed facts with source URLs.

name: RxAssist
query_templates: RxAssist {medication} patient assistance program
notes_for_agent: Use for PAP discovery with manual confirmation. Do not assume a reliable public API.
use: Discover possible PAP routes and store confirmed facts with source URLs.

name: Medicine Assistance Tool
query_templates: Medicine Assistance Tool {medication} patient assistance
notes_for_agent: Use for PAP discovery with manual confirmation. Store facts with source URLs.
use: Discover possible assistance-program routes.

name: PAN Foundation rheumatoid arthritis fund
query_templates: PAN Foundation rheumatoid arthritis fund status
notes_for_agent: Fund status changes; include checked-at timing and uncertainty.
use: Check disease-fund grant status and route eligible patients.

name: HealthWell AutoImmune Medicare Access Fund
query_templates: HealthWell AutoImmune Medicare Access fund status
notes_for_agent: Fund status changes; include checked-at timing and uncertainty.
use: Check disease-fund grant status and route eligible patients.

name: Good Days
query_templates: Good Days disease fund {diagnosis} status
notes_for_agent: Disease-specific availability changes quickly and must be checked before routing.
use: Check disease-fund grant status and route eligible patients.

name: The Assistance Fund
query_templates: The Assistance Fund {diagnosis} fund status
notes_for_agent: Disease-specific availability changes quickly and must be checked before routing.
use: Check disease-fund grant status and route eligible patients.

name: CancerCare Co-Payment Assistance Foundation
query_templates: CancerCare copay foundation fund status {diagnosis}
notes_for_agent: Oncology-specific fund availability and eligibility must be confirmed.
use: Route oncology patients toward disease-specific co-payment help when relevant.

name: Patient Advocate Foundation
query_templates: Patient Advocate Foundation financial aid {diagnosis}
notes_for_agent: Confirm program scope per disease and case need.
use: Route financial aid and case-management support when program scope fits.

name: PrudentRx
query_templates: PrudentRx copay maximizer variable copay program
notes_for_agent: Use vendor-name detection in user plan text. Do not infer enrollment without plan evidence.
use: Detect maximizer or alternative funding signals in plan language.

name: SaveOnSP
query_templates: SaveOnSP copay maximizer alternative funding specialty drugs
notes_for_agent: Use vendor-name detection in user plan text. Do not infer enrollment without plan evidence.
use: Detect maximizer or alternative funding signals in plan language.

name: KFF copay adjustment program background
query_templates: KFF copay accumulator maximizer patient assistance
notes_for_agent: Use for background; rely on plan documents for the user's actual benefit design.
use: Explain accumulator and maximizer mechanics with public background context.

name: HHS OIG copay coupon guidance
query_templates: HHS OIG manufacturer copayment coupons Medicare Part D
notes_for_agent: Use as background for public-program copay-card constraints.
use: Support guardrails that block invalid Medicare or government-program copay-card routing.

name: CMS Part D coverage determination and appeals
query_templates: CMS Part D coverage determination appeal {medication}
notes_for_agent: Use for Medicare-specific artifact routing and appeal-path context.
use: Prepare Medicare appeal, exception, and coverage-determination workflows.

name: Payer appeal instructions
query_templates: payer appeal instructions denial deadline fax upload
notes_for_agent: Prefer the actual plan or denial letter. Generic guidance is only fallback context.
use: Find appeal address, deadline, fax, upload path, and plan-specific requirements.

name: CoverMyMeds ePA
query_templates: CoverMyMeds electronic prior authorization API
notes_for_agent: Partner-gated ePA submission or tracking. Do not claim auto-submission without access and authorization.
use: Future electronic PA submission or tracking once partnership access exists.

name: Surescripts ePA
query_templates: Surescripts electronic prior authorization
notes_for_agent: Partner-gated ePA submission or tracking. Do not claim auto-submission without access and authorization.
use: Future electronic PA submission or tracking once partnership access exists.
